{{Infobox event
| name = Trial
| introduced = cradle-01-unsouled
}}

== Unsouled ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|The [[Trial]] can cause strong, honorable [[sacred artists]] to lose themselves.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c15">''Unsouled'', chapter 15</ref>}}

== Blackflame ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The [[Trial]] is an ancient training course.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c14">''Blackflame'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The [[Trial]] lasts six weeks for [[Lindon]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c15">''Blackflame'', chapter 15</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Events]]
[[Category:Unsouled]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle events]]
